fullAddress.hotelStreetAddress: Downtown Burj Khalifa Street (Burj Khalifa Street, Business Bay, PO Box 8489, Dubai, )

description1.language: Taj Dubai, located in Dubai's Business Bay, offers breathtaking views of the Burj Khalifa and its fountain. This hotel is a short distance from the Dubai Opera and Dubai Mall. The 296 luxurious rooms and suites feature contemporary Indian design with handcrafted furniture and artwork. Dining options include Tesoro (international cuisine), Miss Tess (Asian street food), Bombay Brasserie (award-winning Indian fare), Byzantium Lounge (afternoon tea), Eloquent Elephant gastropub, and Treehouse rooftop lounge. Amenities include a spa, health club, outdoor pool, nightclub, complimentary Wi-Fi, concierge services, babysitting (surcharge), and a complimentary shuttle. The hotel offers 24-hour room service, a coffee shop/cafe, and a poolside bar. Buffet breakfast is available daily (fee applies). Business facilities include a business center, express check-in/out, and 465 square meters of event space. Free self-parking and valet parking are available. The hotel is a short drive from Dubai International Airport (DXB), with a 24-hour airport shuttle available (surcharge). Rooms feature minibars, LED TVs, down comforters, premium bedding, and bathrooms with separate bathtubs and showers. Nearby attractions include Dubai Opera (0.9 km), Dubai Fountain (1.3 km), Burj Khalifa (1.3 km), Dubai Mall (1.6 km), and Dubai International Airport (15.7 km). Business Bay and Burj Khalifa Metro stations are within 1 km. Mall of the Emirates is a 10-minute drive, and Dubai Marina is a 20-minute drive away.

description2.language: The Taj Dubai is a hotel.

hotel.address: Downtown Burj Khalifa Street (Burj Khalifa Street, Business Bay, PO Box 8489, Dubai, )

geoLocation.name: DWC - Al Maktoum Inter. Airport, Dubai
DXB - Dubai International Airport T1, Dubai
DXB - Dubai International Airport T3, Dubai
DXB - Dubai International Airport T2, Dubai
Port Rashid Dubai Harbour - Dubai Cruise Port, Dubai - UAE

roomType.name: LUXURY, TWIN BEDS, CITY VIEW
roomType.roomDescription: This 484-square-foot, non-smoking room offers floor-to-ceiling city views. It features two twin beds, a separate sitting area with a flat-screen LED TV and cable channels, free WiFi, a minibar (fees may apply), a coffee/tea maker, and free bottled water. The private bathroom includes a deep soaking bathtub, a separate shower, and premium toiletries. Amenities include premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, blackout drapes/curtains, turndown service, a safe, an iron/ironing board, air conditioning, and daily housekeeping. A rollaway/extra bed and crib/infant bed are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms may be available. Doorbell and phone notification are provided.

LUXURY, KING BED, CITY VIEW
roomType.roomDescription: This 484-square-foot non-smoking room offers city views and features one king bed, a separate sitting area, and a private bathroom with a deep soaking bathtub and separate shower. Amenities include free WiFi, an LED television with cable channels, a coffee/tea maker, a minibar (fees may apply), 24-hour room service, free bottled water, premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, blackout drapes/curtains, turndown service, a safe, a free newspaper, an iron/ironing board, air conditioning, and daily housekeeping. A doorbell and phone notification are provided. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms may be available.

roomType.name: LUXURY, KING BED, BURJ KHALIFA VIEW

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This modern, air-conditioned room offers partial views of the Burj Khalifa. Amenities include a seating area with flat-screen TV, minibar, and tea/coffee maker. The marble bathroom has two sinks, a bath, a hairdryer, and Molton Brown toiletries.

roomType.name: CLUB, KING BED, BURJ KHALIFA VIEW
roomType.roomDescription: This 484 sq ft Club Level room offers partial views of the Burj Khalifa. It features a king bed, a separate seating area with a flat-screen LED TV, a minibar, and a tea/coffee maker. The marble bathroom includes two sinks, a deep soaking bathtub, and a hairdryer, stocked with Molton Brown toiletries. Amenities include Executive Lounge access with complimentary cocktails (6:00 pm - 8:00 pm), buffet breakfast, light refreshments, and internet access. Guests also receive complimentary use of the steam room and sauna, and access to a private meeting room for two hours (subject to availability). Free WiFi, premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, blackout drapes, turndown service, a safe, free newspaper, an iron/ironing board, and daily housekeeping are also provided. Air conditioning and doorbell/phone notification are available. Connecting rooms may be requested. Note: Extra beds are not accommodated.

roomType.name: CLUB, TWIN BEDS, BURJ KHALIFA VIEW
GRAND, SUITE, KING BED, BURJ KHALIFA VIEW
LUXURY, TWIN BEDS, BURJ KHALIFA VIEW

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This modern, air-conditioned room offers partial views of the Burj Khalifa. Amenities include a seating area with flat-screen TV, minibar, and tea/coffee maker. The marble bathroom features two sinks, a bath, a hairdryer, and Molton Brown toiletries.

roomType.name: JUNIOR SUITE, CITY VIEW

roomAmenities.amenity: AFTERNOON SNACKS AND DRINKS IN THE EXECUTIVE LOUNGE
EVENING SNACKS AND DRINKS IN THE EXECUTIVE LOUNGE

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL
FREE NEWSPAPERS AND MAGAZINES IN THE EXECUTIVE LOUNGE

roomType.roomDescription: This elegant, air-conditioned suite boasts Business Bay views and features a living area with a flat-screen TV, minibar, and tea/coffee facilities. The en-suite marble bathroom includes two sinks, a bath, a hairdryer, and Molton Brown toiletries. Access is also provided to the Executive Lounge, cocktails, butler service, steam room, hot tub, and a meeting room. Interconnecting access to a Luxury Room City View with its own main entrance is available.

roomType.name: JUNIOR SUITE, KING BED, CITY VIEW
roomType.roomDescription: This 882-square-foot Executive Level room offers a king bed, city views, and access to the Executive Lounge (including buffet breakfast, light refreshments, internet access, and 2 hours of meeting room use, subject to availability). The room features a bedroom, living room, and dining area. Amenities include free WiFi, an LED television with cable channels, a coffee/tea maker, a minibar (fees may apply), 24-hour room service, free bottled water, premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, blackout drapes/curtains, turndown service, a private bathroom with a deep soaking bathtub and separate shower, a safe, a free newspaper, an iron/ironing board, air conditioning, and daily housekeeping. A rollaway/extra bed and crib/infant bed are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms may be available. The room is non-smoking. Doorbell and phone notification are available for accessibility.

roomType.name: LUXURY, SUITE, KING BED, BURJ KHALIFA VIEW

roomType.roomDescription: This spacious, air-conditioned suite offers partial views of the Burj Khalifa. It features a living area with a flat-screen TV and media hub, a dining area, a minibar, and tea/coffee facilities. The en-suite marble bathroom includes two sinks, a bath, a hairdryer, and Molton Brown toiletries. Interconnecting access to a Luxury Room City View is available.

roomAttributes.attribute: BATHTUB OR SHOWER ALLOCATION ON ARRIVAL

roomType.roomDescription: This spacious, air-conditioned room boasts floor-to-ceiling views of Business Bay. Amenities include a seating area with flat-screen TV, minibar, and tea/coffee maker. The marble bathroom features two sinks, a bath, a hairdryer, and Molton Brown toiletries. Interconnecting access to a Luxury Room City View is available.

roomType.name: BURJ, LUXURY, TWIN BEDS
roomType.roomDescription: This 484 sq ft non-smoking room features two twin beds, a separate sitting area, and a private bathroom with a deep soaking bathtub and separate shower. Amenities include free WiFi, an LED television with cable channels, a coffee/tea maker, a minibar (fees may apply), 24-hour room service, free bottled water, premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, blackout drapes/curtains, turndown service, a safe, a free newspaper, an iron/ironing board, air conditioning, and daily housekeeping. A doorbell and phone notification are provided. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms may be available.

roomType.name: BURJ, LUXURY, KING BED
roomType.roomDescription: This 484 sq ft non-smoking room features one king bed, a separate sitting area, and a private bathroom with a deep soaking bathtub and separate shower. Amenities include free WiFi, an LED television with cable channels, a coffee/tea maker, a minibar (fees may apply), 24-hour room service, free bottled water, premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, blackout drapes/curtains, turndown service, a safe, a free newspaper, an iron/ironing board, air conditioning, and daily housekeeping. A doorbell and phone notification are provided. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms may be available.

roomType.name: LUXURY, SUITE, KING BED
roomType.roomDescription: This 1238 sq ft executive-level suite features a bedroom, living room, and dining area. Amenities include a king bed, premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, and blackout drapes. Two bathrooms offer a deep soaking bathtub and a separate shower. A kitchenette is equipped with a refrigerator, microwave, cookware/dishware, and coffee/tea maker. Enjoy an LED television with cable channels, free WiFi, and daily housekeeping. Executive Lounge access provides buffet breakfast, light refreshments, internet access, and 2 hours of meeting room use (subject to availability). A safe, iron/ironing board, and free newspaper are also provided. Rollaway/extra beds and cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Air conditioning, doorbell/phone notification, and turndown service are included. The suite is non-smoking, and connecting/adjoining rooms may be available.

roomType.name: JUNIOR SUITE, KING BED, CITY VIEW, CLUB LOUNGE ACCESS
JUNIOR SUITE, CITY VIEW, CLUB LOUNGE ACCESS
LUXURY, WITH EXTRA BED, CITY VIEW
JUNIOR SUITE, DOUBLE BED, WITH EXTRA BED, CITY VIEW
LUXURY, FAMILY, KING BED, CITY VIEW
roomType.roomDescription: This 624-square-foot non-smoking room offers city views and features one king bed, a separate sitting area with a day bed and twin sofa bed, and a private bathroom with a deep soaking bathtub and separate shower. Amenities include free WiFi, an LED television with cable channels, a coffee/tea maker, a minibar (fees may apply), 24-hour room service, free bottled water, premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, blackout drapes/curtains, turndown service, air conditioning, and daily housekeeping. A safe is provided, and rollaway/extra beds and cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms may be available. A doorbell and phone notification are included for accessibility.

roomType.name: LUXURY, FAMILY, TWIN BEDS, CITY VIEW
roomType.roomDescription: This 624-square-foot non-smoking room offers city views and features two twin beds, a separate sitting area, and a private bathroom with a deep soaking bathtub and separate shower. Amenities include free WiFi, an LED television with cable channels, a coffee/tea maker, a minibar (fees may apply), 24-hour room service, free bottled water, premium bedding, a down duvet, a pillow menu, blackout drapes/curtains, turndown service, air conditioning, and daily housekeeping. A day bed and twin sofa bed are also available, along with a safe. Rollaway/extra beds and free cribs/infant beds are available upon request. Connecting/adjoining rooms may be available. A doorbell and phone notification are provided for accessibility.
